description_long: This is a rectangular grave plot bordered by low, weathered stone curbing, with a surface covered in green gravel and patches of moss. At the head of the plot stands a tall, arched headstone made of aged gray stone, featuring engraved inscriptions and a faint relief of an angel or figure at the top. Adjacent to the main headstone is a smaller, slanted stone marker, also inscribed but more worn and partially sunken into the ground. The grave plot is surrounded by a thin layer of moss and dirt, indicating long-term exposure to the elements. The overall appearance suggests a traditional burial site, likely from an older cemetery, with both markers showing signs of age and weathering. The inscriptions on the stones are partially legible, adding a sense of history and reverence to the scene.
description: A rectangular grave plot with a tall, arched headstone and a smaller, slanted stone marker, both weathered and inscribed, set within a border of stone curbing and green gravel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed inscriptions and relief on the main arched headstone, with the smaller marker clearly visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the flat expanse of green gravel within the stone border.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both the main headstone and the smaller marker, with the stone border and gravel surface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the open grave plot, with the stone border and mossy patches evident.
